description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a robust, rectangular metal head with slightly rounded edges and a central wooden handle. The head is metallic gray, showing a solid, dense construction suitable for delivering powerful blows. The handle is made of wood, displaying a natural grain pattern and a straight, cylindrical form that tapers slightly towards the end for grip. The junction between the head and handle is reinforced, with the handle securely wedged into the head. The hammer exhibits a utilitarian, industrial appearance, typical of tools used for demolition or heavy construction tasks. No visible branding, markings, or accessories are present, and the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
description: A sturdy sledgehammer with a solid gray metal head and a straight wooden handle, designed for heavy-duty striking tasks. The tool has a clean, utilitarian look with no visible branding or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat striking face of the metal head and the wooden handle centered behind it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the straight wooden handle and the rectangular profile of the metal head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back face of the metal head and the end of the wooden handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's length and the other side of the metal head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a natural grain, cylindrical and slightly tapered, smooth with no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, with flat striking faces and slightly rounded edges, no claws or peens.
